title: palicourea dives
intro: Palicourea dives, also known as Pajonal or Shiny Leaf, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Palicourea dives include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as being used to treat conditions such as asthma and eczema. Herbal preparations of Palicourea dives include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, ointments, and other medicinal products.
